title: A Potent Threat in Strait of Hormuz: Iran’s ‘Mosquito Fleet’
summary: Although much of the regular Iranian navy is destroyed, the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps can still deploy small, speedy boats to disrupt shipping.
whyItMatters: Live signal from NYT World Feed — requires review and classification.
rawText: A Potent Threat in Strait of Hormuz: Iran’s ‘Mosquito Fleet’. Although much of the regular Iranian navy is destroyed, the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps can still deploy small, speedy boats to disrupt shipping.

title: Kyiv Mass Shooting Kills 6 and Gunman Is Shot
summary: Kyiv Mass Shooting Kills 6 and Gunman Is Shot Dead After Taking Hostages in Grocery. It was the deadliest mass shooting in Ukraine in years, where firearms have proliferated since the war with Russia began.
whyItMatters: Immediate operational concern requiring priority assessment. CONFLICT and RUSSIA dynamics are directly implicated.
